hero.title: Empowering Industries Through Integrated EPC, Industrial Supply, and Construction Solutions for Geothermal, Petrochemical, Oil & Gas, and Mining Sectors.
hero.desc: Providing engineering excellence with uncompromising standards. General supplies and stockist for pipes, fittings, flanges, and instruments.

home.title: PT. Yuritech Putra Perkasa | Industrial Stockist, Supplier & EPC Contractor
home.description: PT. Yuritech Putra Perkasa is a trusted industrial supplier, stockist, and EPC contractor since 2005. Supplying high-quality industrial valves, flanges, gaskets, fittings, pipes, and steel materials in Jakarta and across Indonesia.

about.title: About PT. Yuritech Putra Perkasa | Industrial Supply & Construction Company
about.description: Learn about PT. Yuritech Putra Perkasa, incorporated in Jakarta in 2005 as a stockist, trading, supplier, and EPC contractor / construction service provider fulfilling the rapid development of diverse modern industries.

products.title: Industrial Products & Materials | PT. Yuritech Putra Perkasa
products.description: Browse our wide range of premium industrial products: valves, flanges, gaskets, fittings, pipes, structural iron, steel, instrumentation, and stud bolts from leading international brands.

projects.title: Our Projects | PT. Yuritech Putra Perkasa
projects.description: Explore our featured projects and proven track record in EPC contracting and industrial construction services across Indonesia.

hero.subtitle: About Us
hero.title: Company Overview
hero.description: PT. YURITECH PUTRA PERKASA was incorporated on Jakarta established since year on 2005 as an Stockiest, Supplier, Trading & EPC Contractor / Construction Services. We fulfill any rapid development of diversed modern industries.

overview.subtitle: Introducing Our Company
overview.title: PT. Yuritech Putra Perkasa
overview.p1: PT. Yuritech Putra Perkasa was incorporated on Jakarta established since year on 2005 as an Stockiest, Supplier, Trading & EPC Contractor/ Construction Services to fulfill any rapid development of diversed modern industries (Geothermal, Petrochemical, Oil & Gas, Industrial Supplies and Construction Services (EPC Contractor) an ever increasing needs for industrial plants.
overview.p2: PT. Yuritech Putra Perkasa not just an ordinary Stockist & Supplier company. The customer satisfactory and prompt delivery are our first policy. providing materials that are need on a Quick or Emergency requirements.
overview.p3: We strongly believe that we would be qualified as a good business partners of your respectable firm and would have a change to serve you with competitive cost/price and best quality product.
overview.p4: The goals is we strive efficiency in overall management and services system to ensure a reduced cost and satisfactory service for all our customers.
overview.p5: We committed to “By supplying better quality to fulfill increasingly diversified demands”, we dedicate ourselves to development of economical growth and improvement of national living standards.
overview.p6: We could support any industrial needs and provides all areas of industry with our stocks of high quality of many materials such as Pipes, Fittings, Flanges, Valves, Instrument Fittings / Controls and Steel Structures with reasonable best price.
overview.p7: We do also variety experienced services in construction and installation such as Assembling Interchange Piping, Tie-In/Hot Tapping Connection, Build the Road, Civil Works in Pipeline Supports, Insulation the Pipeline, etc. We welcome the opportunity to resolve difficult supply problems as well as

vision.subtitle: Our Vision
vision.desc: Delivering Trusted Local Content Solutions for Indonesia’s Geothermal, Oil & Gas, Power, Manufacturing, and Industrial Sectors.

mission.subtitle: Our Mission
mission.m1: To deliver high-quality EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) services that meet client expectations.
mission.m2: To prioritize safety, efficiency, and sustainability in every project we undertake.
mission.m3: To foster a culture of continuous improvement, innovation, and professional growth for all employees.

values.subtitle: Our Values
values.title: The principles that drive our success.
values.desc: We don't just supply materials; we deliver excellence. Our values are the DNA of our company, guiding every decision, partnership, and project we undertake.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.desc: We source and deliver only the highest grade materials, ensuring unmatched durability and safety.

customer.title: Customer Obsession
customer.desc: Your success is our priority. We are committed to prompt delivery and exceeding expectations at every turn.

agile.title: Agile Execution
agile.desc: In a fast-paced industry, we adapt quickly to resolve complex supply chain issues and emergency needs.

integrity.title: Integrity & Trust
integrity.desc: We build lasting partnerships through radical transparency, competitive pricing, and unwavering reliability.

operational.title: Operational Excellence
operational.desc: Driven by expertise, our highly trained professionals execute complex construction services flawlessly.

growth.title: Sustainable Growth
growth.desc: Dedicated to driving economic progress and improving national living standards through responsible practices.

hero.subtitle: Our Track Record
hero.title: Featured Projects
hero.description: A showcase of our extensive engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) portfolio. We consistently deliver high-quality industrial solutions across Indonesia.

list.subtitle: Project Portfolio
list.description: Explore our diverse range of engineering, procurement, and construction projects. Click on any project to view detailed specifications and galleries.

1.title: Procurement of Piping Installation Services KMJ-30, KMJ 39, KMJ-A9(KMJ90)&KMJ-A4(KMJ91)
1.description: Construction services for pipeline installation including hot tapping and line stopping, including supervision, inspection, and documentation.

2.title: Procurement of Access Road Repair Services for Ulubelu Area
2.description: Access road improvement services for the Ulubelu Area, including material procurement, civil work, road construction, testing, and documentation.

3.title: Piping Work for Pipeline Route from Well UBL B-8 to Cluster B Header Line
3.description: Pipeline construction services from well UBL B-8 to the Cluster B Header Line, including material procurement, civil work, piping installation, testing, and documentation.

4.title: Procurement of Welding Services for Production Test Facilities and Water Pipe Drilling on a Call of Order Basis for 2 Years
4.description: Construction services for production testing facilities and water pipeline drilling with a call-of-order basis for 2 years, including supervision, inspection, and documentation.
